title: IndentationError を generated_artifact_invalid として正しく分類する
goal: generated test file などの構文不正、とくに IndentationError を test_failure ではなく generated_artifact_invalid として分類し、report.json に正しく反映されるようにする
objective: SyntaxError 系分類の網羅改善（IndentationError 含む）
scope: failure_type classification logic for generated artifact syntax errors
unit tests for syntax error classification
out_of_scope: live API behavior changes unrelated to syntax error classification
constraints: existing failure classification behavior outside SyntaxError family must not break
report.json existing required keys must remain backward compatible
no provider files may be changed
no global_rules or master_instruction changes in this session
outputs: correct canonical classification for IndentationError as generated_artifact_invalid
tests proving SyntaxError family classification behavior
report.json containing corrected failure_type and failure metadata
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: syntax error family classification logic, canonical failure mapping, report payload wiring limited to this classification purpose
backend/tests/test_run_session_failure_classification.py: add or update tests only for AC-66-01 to AC-66-04 coverage

completion_criteria.condition: IndentationError produced from generated artifact is classified as generated_artifact_invalid instead of test_failure
SyntaxError family classification does not change unrelated failure_type behavior
report.json retains top-level failure_type and includes failure metadata after corrected classification

review_points: 副作用なし（既存破壊なし）
merge_requirements: git diff --name-only must contain only allowed_changes files
compileall on orchestration and backend must pass
